请对以下新检索到的证据进行单点评估（JSON List 格式）：

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_001394
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"type": "texture", "chunkid": "chunk_001394", "paperid": "paper_003", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compound emissions with TROPOMI HCHO observations and its impact on summertime surface ozone simulation over China\", \"md_filename\": \"Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compoun.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 117, \"content_length\": 669, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}"}
            Content: {"text": "In this study, we extended the RAPAS assimilation system with the EnKF assimilation algorithm to optimize NMVOC emissions using the TROPOMI HCHO retrievals. Taking the MEIC 2020 for anthropogenic emissions and MEGANv2.1 output for biogenic sources as a priori, NMVOC emissions over China in August 2022 were inferred. Importantly, we implicitly took the chemical feedback among VOC-  $\\mathrm{NO}_x\\mathrm{-O}_3$  into account by simultaneously adjusting  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions using nationwide in-situ  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  observations. Furthermore, we quantified the impact of NMVOC emission inversion on surface  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  pollution using the CMAQ-IRR model."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_001303
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"paperid": "paper_003", "type": "texture", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compound emissions with TROPOMI HCHO observations and its impact on summertime surface ozone simulation over China\", \"md_filename\": \"Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compoun.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 13, \"content_length\": 1395, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "chunkid": "chunk_001303"}
            Content: {"text": "Most studies regarding the inversion of NMVOC emissions or its impact on  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  neglected the uncertainties associated with  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ -dependent production or loss of NMVOC oxidation and  $\\mathrm{O}_3$ . An iteratively nonlinear joint inversion of  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  and NMVOCs using multi-species observations is expected to minimize the uncertainties in their emissions and is well-suited to address the intricate relationship among VOC- $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ - $\\mathrm{O}_3$ . In this study, we extended the Regional multi-Air Pollutant Assimilation System (RAPAS) upon the ensemble Kalman filter (EnKF) assimilation algorithm to enhance the optimization of NMVOC emissions over China, utilizing the TROPOspheric Monitoring Instrument (TROPOMI) HCHO retrievals with high spatial coverage and resolution. To more accurately quantify the impact of NMVOC emissions on  $\\mathrm{O}_3$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions were simultaneously adjusted using nationwide in-situ  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  observations. Process analysis was subsequently employed to quantify various chemical pathways associated with  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  formation and loss. Through a top-down constraint on both emissions, this study aims to offer a more scientific insight into the consequences of optimizing NMVOC emissions on  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  and contribute to the development of appropriate emission reduction policies."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_001351
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compound emissions with TROPOMI HCHO observations and its impact on summertime surface ozone simulation over China\", \"md_filename\": \"Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compoun.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 72, \"content_length\": 620, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "type": "texture", "chunkid": "chunk_001351", "paperid": "paper_003"}
            Content: {"text": "Figure 5 shows the time series of simulated and observed hourly  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  concentrations and their RMSEs, verified against surface monitoring sites. The VEP achieved better representations of diurnal  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  variations compared with those in the CEP1, especially excelling in reproducing elevated  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  concentrations at noon. Constraining the NMVOC emissions also led to better model simulations in terms of RMSE throughout the entire study period. Overall, the assimilation of HCHO column observations effectively reduced NMVOC emission uncertainties and consequently improved simulations of"}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_001312
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"chunkid": "chunk_001312", "paperid": "paper_003", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compound emissions with TROPOMI HCHO observations and its impact on summertime surface ozone simulation over China\", \"md_filename\": \"Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compoun.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 26, \"content_length\": 765, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "type": "texture"}
            Content: {"text": "State variables for emissions include  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  and NMVOCs. To reduce the degree of freedom in the analysis and avoid the difficulty associated with estimating spatiotemporal variations in background errors for individual species, we focus on optimizing the lumped total NMVOC emissions. During the forecast step, we differentiate individual NMVOC species emissions from the total NMVOC emissions using bottom-up statistical information. For a consistent comparison between simulations and observations, model-simulated  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  were diagnosed at the time and location of surface  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  measurements, whereas model-simulated HCHO was horizontally sampled to align with TROPOMI HCHO VCD retrievals, and subsequently integrated vertically."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_001315
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"type": "texture", "paperid": "paper_003", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compound emissions with TROPOMI HCHO observations and its impact on summertime surface ozone simulation over China\", \"md_filename\": \"Constraint of non-methane volatile organic compoun.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 30, \"content_length\": 500, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "chunkid": "chunk_001315"}
            Content: {"text": "sensitivity experiment in which HCHO columns were empirically bias-corrected according to the error characteristics described above (Figure S1). The posterior emissions increased by  $12.8\\%$  compared to those in the base experiment (EMDA), indicating that the existing retrieval error in HCHO measurements likely exerts an influence on the estimation of NMVOC emissions. -The representation error can be disregarded because the model's resolution significantly surpasses that of the TROPOMI pixels."}

## 评估分析
- **高价值结果**: 55 条

## 关键洞察
- 图6显示汽油/柴油车在国III-V标准下PM2.5中Na、Mg、K、Ca的排放因子显著高于其他无机元素，主要来源于燃料添加剂，且柴油车排放普遍高于汽油车，随标准升级排放降低。
- 减排技术仅应用于不足1%船舶，对PM/CO排放影响微弱。
- PM2.5浓度升高时，工业源对VOC混合比贡献升至27.3%，对OH损失率、OFP和SOAP的贡献分别达56.2%、48.4%和57.0%，成为主导污染源。
- 无实质性内容，仅为PM2.5中无机元素排放特征的章节标题
- 描述了不同排放源（船运、生物质燃烧、生物源）的计算方法与数据来源，其中NMVOC排放采用MEGAN模型估算。

## 任务要求
1. 基于以上信息，生成一个全面、连贯的检索过程总结
2. 总结应包括用户问题、检索策略、检索结果、评估分析和关键洞察
3. 总结应逻辑清晰、重点突出，便于用户快速掌握问答核心
4. 使用自然、流畅的语言，避免过于技术性的表达
5. 总结长度适中，不要过长或过短

### [11:23:56] Orchestrator: LLM Interaction

**System Message**:
```

        # 任务整体介绍
        你是【首席科学家】，你处在一个科学知识发现团队中，你们团队的目标是以用户输入的初始问题为目标，深度并且广泛地进行论文调研，发现新的、有价值的、可验证的科学知识。
        为了进行科学知识发现，你和你的团队根据已经搜索并且阅读的论文信息正在构建一棵【科研证据树】。
        # 团队整体介绍
        你所处的科学知识发现团队中，你是首席科学家，即实验室领导的身份。通过输出的检索任务，你负责把握整个团队进行论文文献调研的方向，你的作用非常重要。
        你的团队中有许多验证人员，即实验室研究生的身份。他们会根据你的检索策略去检索论文数据，阅读检索到的图片和文本，进行初步的总结，评估检索到的内容是否符合预期，对每一个结果是否应该进行扩展阅读提出建议，并且将结果反馈给你。
        你的团队中有若干思考人员，即实验室小导师的身份。他们是一个小团队，会负责根据验证人员的反馈，对检索到的内容进行深度思考，挖掘知识之间的关联，发现新的、有价值的、可验证的科学知识，形成最终的科学回答报告。
        # 你的核心职责
        作为团队大脑，你不直接阅读原文，你的工作是**把握方向**：
        1.  **初始规划**：面对用户的新问题，你需要构思 3-5 个不同维度的切入点。
        2.  **动态决策**：根据【验证人员】（Evaluator）反馈的评估报告，决定这棵树该怎么长。
        3.  **方向把控**：你需要平衡【广度】（寻找新灵感）和【深度】（验证证据链）。

        # 决策逻辑：
        1. 继续检索时，你需要输出一系列策略的列表。每一个元素是一个策略，以字典的形式输出。
        2. 每个策略字典中，它首先有action固定为call_tool。
            ParentNode：int类型，你的决策可以来源于某一个搜索策略对应的节点，也可以来源于你综合所有结果进行的思考。这个属性命名为”ParentNode“。如果来源于节点，你应该将这个节点的ID作为ParentNode；如果是你综合考虑的结果，你将属性设置为"0"。
            tool_name：str类型。根据你选择的策略决定，是strategy_semantic_searchstrategy_metadata_search。
            args：dict类型。调用检索工具时需要的参数。根据你选择的策略决定，按照下面两种策略的要求去添加args具体的内容。
            reason：str类型。你选择这个策略的原因，不要太长。
        可选策略：
        1. 深度挖掘 (DEEPER - Exploitation)
        * 触发条件：验证人员报告某个节点是【DEEPER】（高价值），你查看验证人员的汇报，发现确实有所帮助，决定在这个论文的基础上进行进一步探索。深度挖掘策略时，策略的ParentNode必须是一个节点的ID。
        * 操作：返回给你的数据中包含 `paper_id`（论文ID）你可以选择paper_id去进行查询同一篇论文。在深度挖掘中你要严格使用你认为的ParentNode的信息，不能随意生成新的关键词。
        * 目的：将孤立的线索变成完整的证据链。
        * 参数：如果选择deeper策略，你的返回中tool_name为strategy_metadata_search，args中包含paper_id。
        2. 广度扩展 (BROADER - Exploration)**
        * 触发条件：
            1. 当前返回了大量被重复搜索的论文，说明该方向已经几乎彻底研究透彻，需要寻找新的可能的领域。 此时触发，ParentNode应该设置为"0"。
            2. 当前返回的论文数量过少，说明对应的搜索策略不能在数据库中找到支持的论文，或者是找到的论文与用户问题相关性太低。需要寻找新的可能的搜索条件。此时触发，ParentNode应该设置为"0"。
            3. 针对某一条返回的检索和评估结果，验证人员提出了使用新的专业名词的建议，或者你查看后认为可以提炼出一个新的关键词进行检索。此时触发，ParentNode应该设置为对应节点的ID。
        * 操作：根据验证人员的建议或者你自己的判断，你可以选择使用新的专业名词或者新的关键词进行检索。
        * 目的：扩展搜索范围，寻找新的、有价值的、可验证的科学知识。
        * 参数：如果选择broader策略，你的返回中tool_name为strategy_semantic_search，query_intent是你决定的下一步用于检索的文本词句。
        生成每个策略前，请先在内部思考：1. 这个策略与用户原始问题的相关性打分（0-10）2. 这个策略与已有历史策略的新颖性（0-10）只有两项都≥7才允许输出。
        
        # 历史策略参考
        在生成新策略时，请参考已有的历史策略，避免重复，并尝试在已有策略的基础上进行创新和优化。系统会为你提供当前会话中的所有历史策略信息，帮助你做出更好的决策。
        
```

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为现有船舶排放清单因使用固定排放因子（不随速度和负载变化）导致地理分布偏差，且常忽略时间变化性。,理由是指出排放模型的核心缺陷，但缺乏具体数据或深挖线索（如实验对比结果）。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Emission factors', 'temporal variation', 'geographical distribution']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The available ship emission inventories have used emission factors that are not dependent on the changes of vessel speed and engine load. The detailed shipping inventories using the presented modeling system have therefore resulted in a substantially different geographical distribution of ship emissions, compared with the previous available ship emission inventories. In most cases, it is not possible to compare the seasonal differences between ship emission inventories, as the temporal variation of emissions has commonly been neglected in previous studies.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 6, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为研究武汉机动车PM2.5排放特征，包含碳质成分、水溶性离子和无机元素分析，旨在为减排提供参考。,理由是重复出现冗余文本（与chunk_003405相同），且仅为研究目标描述未包含新数据或结论。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'from vehicles became outstanding in Wuhan. In order to find out the characteristics of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations and associated chemical components from on-road emissions in urban areas in Wuhan, which was located in the central and southern China and the climates were high temperature and humidity, ten typical motor vehicles were selected to carry out this research.  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emission factors and emission concentration characteristics of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  from motor vehicles under different emission standards at different operating speeds were performed. The characteristics of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  components, including carbonaceous components, water-soluble ions and inorganic elements, were detected as well.  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  composition spectrum of vehicle emission in Wuhan would be finally obtained. Results of this study would help formulating measures for the reduction of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emissions from vehicles in Wuhan, and provide a reference for  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution control of motor vehicles in similar types.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002164, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'PM chemical constituent disaggregation in AIS-based ship emission models'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 5, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为船舶PM排放组分（如黑碳与元素碳）存在技术测量差异，固定发动机载荷模型（Corbett et al., 2010）忽略负载影响导致不确定性。,理由是与主要问题（VOC源分配和PM2.5控制）关联度低；信息聚焦船舶局部技术规范。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['BC versus EC measurements', 'Ship engine emissions']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Information is currently scarce especially regarding the geographical distribution and chemical composition of PM emissions arising from ship traffic, and the chemical composition details have not commonly been introduced to global inventories of ship emissions. Corbett et al. (2010) subdivided PM from marine traffic into organic carbon and black carbon. They did not allow for the dependency on engine load of the constituents of PM; instead, fixed, predetermined loads were used for main and auxiliary engines. However, the emissions of both the various chemical components of PM and CO are sensitive to engine load. The classifications of PM components, and the detailed definitions of such classes also can vary, depending on the measurement techniques used. For instance, the experimental methods using absorptive techniques often provide black carbon (Eyring et al., 2010), but chemical techniques report a division to elemental and organic carbon. Clearly, black carbon and elemental carbon cannot be used as synonymous expressions, since there are components of organic carbon, which also absorb light (e.g. Andreae and Gelencsér, 2006).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_004616, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'OC/EC ratio differentiation between gasoline and diesel vehicles using PEMS'}。

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The figure shows OC/EC ratios of PM2.5 from gasoline and diesel vehicles across various emission standards, highlighting differences in carbonaceous emissions. The OC/EC ratio indicates the source of PM2.5, showing higher organic content in emissions from gasoline vehicles and illustrating how emission standards impact carbonaceous components.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为船舶排放模型可扩展至其他海域，但依赖卫星AIS数据和国际合作以实现全球精确排放清单构建。,理由是提供模型扩展的可行性与局限，但缺乏具体排放数据或量化结果，适合作为背景信息保留。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['satellite-based AIS', 'global emission inventories']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The model presented can be extended for other marine regions besides the Baltic Sea, if the model input data will be available, including especially the AIS data. However, the AIS data cannot be received across extensive sea areas, unless a satellite-based AIS reception is used. A flexible international cooperation between maritime authorities would therefore be most valuable to be able to construct more accurate emission inventories on a global scale.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_004167, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'PMF model quantification of SOAP contribution from VOC sources'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 6, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为概述研究方法框架：基于冬季VOC监测数据计算OH损耗率/OFP/SOAP，通过PMF模型溯源并对比污染期差异,理由是仅重复描述方法论框架，无新数据或结论性发现,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Therefore, this study attempted to comprehensively estimate the reactivity, OFP, and SOAP of different ambient VOC sources by the PMF model. The hourly ambient VOCs monitoring data during wintertime from a megacity in Central China was adopted. The levels, compositions, and diurnal variations of VOCs were firstly studied.  $\\mathrm{L_{OH}}$ , OFP, and SOAP of VOC species were then calculated. The VOC sources were identified with the PMF model. The  $\\mathrm{L_{OH}}$ , OFP, and SOAP of each identified VOC source were further quantified. Finally, the differences in source variations between clean and pollution episodes were discussed.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002254, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'chemical constituent-disaggregated PM emission modeling'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图5展示硫酸盐、有机碳(OC)等PM组分的排放因子数学模型推导结果，其中OC排放拟合自Agrawal和Petzold研究，且硫酸盐排放依赖燃料硫含量。,理由是关键图表(Fig.5)揭示PM组分建模的数学方法及燃料硫依赖机制，支持深度模型复现。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PM component modeling', 'fuel sulphur dependency', 'emission fitting']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'been modeled based on the variation of SFOC. An additional dependency for OC is used as given in Eq. (13c) for which results from Agrawal et al. (2008a, b, 2010) and Petzold et al. (2010) were used and fitted to a mathematical form (see Fig. 5). The emissions of all PM components are modeled based on the variations of SFOC and instantaneous power, and in addition the emission factors of sulphate and associated water are dependent on the fuel sulphur content.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_001327, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'TROPOMI HCHO assimilation techniques for NMVOC emission optimization'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图2揭示TROPOMI约束后中国NMVOC排放空间重分布：从全国热点转为聚焦NCP/YRD/PRD/SCB等人为活动区，显示排放优化与区域经济密度的强关联。,理由是关键空间分布图展示卫星约束如何重塑排放热点，对区域治理具政策启示,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Emission spatial redistribution', 'Anthropogenic NMVOC', 'Biogenic emission hotspots']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Figure 2 shows the spatial distribution of temporally averaged prior and posterior NMVOC emissions, along with their differences, in NMVOC emissions. Hotspots of prior NMVOC emissions were prevalent across much of central and southern China. However, posterior NMVOC emissions were predominantly concentrated in the NCP, Yangtze River Delta (YRD), PRD, and Sichuan Basin (SCB), characterized by high levels of anthropogenic activity. High emissions are also located in parts of central and southern China with warm climate favorable for emitting biogenic NMVOCs. Employing TROPOMI HCHO observations as constraints led to widespread decreases'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_004161, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'PMF model quantification of SOAP contribution from VOC sources'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为研究量化了五种VOC来源对大气反应性的贡献：溶剂使用(11.6%)、汽油蒸发(14.2%)、燃烧源(39.0%)、汽车排放(22.5%)、工业源(12.6%)；工业源是OH损耗率(32.2%)和SOAP形成(32.8%)主要贡献者，汽车排放主导OFP(27.8%),理由是提供关键量化数据及污染控制策略建议，含具体PMF模型应用细节，paperid信息支持深挖,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Positive Matrix Factorization', 'Ozone Formation Potential', 'Secondary Organic Aerosol Potential']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Volatile organic compounds (VOCs) are important contributors to atmospheric chemical reactivity rate  $(\\mathrm{L_{OH}})$ , ozone formation potential (OFP), and secondary organic aerosol formation potential (SOAP). The purpose of this study was to determine the contributions of different VOC sources to  $\\mathrm{L_{OH}}$ , OFP, and SOAP using positive matrix factorization (PMF) model. Hourly observation of ambient VOCs at a megacity of Central China was conducted for one month in winter. The  $\\mathrm{L_{OH}}$ , OFP, and SOAP of VOC species were firstly estimated. The PMF model was then used to apportion their sources. Five VOC sources including solvent usage, gasoline evaporation, combustion sources, vehicle emissions, and industrial sources were apportioned with their average contributions of  $11.6\\%$ ,  $14.2\\%$ ,  $39.0\\%$ ,  $22.5\\%$ , and  $12.6\\%$ , respectively. Industrial sources were the highest contributors to the  $\\mathrm{L_{OH}}$  and SOAP with average contributions of  $32.2\\%$  and  $32.8\\%$ , respectively, while vehicle emissions contributed most to the OFP  $(27.8\\%)$ . This study highlighted that the VOCs and ozone pollution control should give priority to the reactivity (OFP and SOAP) based strategies rather than concentration contribution-based strategies.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002161, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'PM chemical constituent disaggregation in AIS-based ship emission models'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 6, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为船运硫限制减少PM排放（主要成分为硫酸盐)，但洗涤后处理技术（如引用Corbett et al., 2010）在MarPol Annex VI下更有效控制残余PM。,理由是中等价值但非直接核心；作为法规影响背景信息保留；无强深挖线索（仅泛泛引用）。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Scrubbing systems for PM', 'IMO Marpol compliance']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Emissions of PM from shipping have a significant impact on ambient air quality in densely populated coastal areas and these may substantially contribute to detrimental impacts on human health (Corbett et al., 2007). Stringent limits for the sulphur content of marine fuels and  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$ -emissions are expected to reduce the emissions from ships. The PM emissions are simultaneously reduced, as a major part of PM emissions is in the form of sulphate. However, sulphur content reductions will not eradicate PM emissions completely (Winnes and Fridell, 2010b; Fridell et al., 2008; Cooper, 2001, 2003; Kasper et al., 2007; Buhaug et al., 2009), even if the global fleet would switch to low sulphur fuel. The emissions of PM can also be reduced by using after-treatment techniques, which will remove a significant part of the PM emissions (Corbett et al., 2010; European Commission Directorate General Environment, 2005) Scrubbing systems from engine manufacturers have been commonly applied to diesel power plants on land, but their commercial installations to ships have been scarce. This is expected to change, after the the implementation of the stringent sulphur limits included in the revised Marpol Annex VI of the IMO (International Maritime Organization, 1998).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------

证据节点ID: chunk_003027, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'comparative analysis of CMB and PMF receptor models for OC/EC source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为在排放清单整合中，当BC和OC排放总和超过PM₂.₅时，会导致化学传输模型出现负PMfine排放值；该研究采用将PM₂.₅调整为BC与OC排放总和的校正方法。,理由是内容涉及多源排放清单整合的关键技术问题，提供具体数据冲突解决方案，尽管未提及可深挖的图表或论文ID，但具有方法论参考价值。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PMfine', 'emission inventory reconciliation', 'negative emissions adjustment', 'ANL-India', 'REAS2']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Second, we used BC and OC emissions from ANL-India but used  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  and  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$  emissions from REAS2. In certain grids, the sum of BC and OC emissions may exceed  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emissions because the two inventories may use different activity data, emission factors, and spatial proxies. The so-called "PMfine" species in chemical transport models are usually calculated by subtracting BC and OC emissions from total  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emissions, leading to negative emissions of PMfine in those grids. In this case, we adjusted the emissions of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  to the sum of BC and OC emissions for each sector.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002316, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'comparative validation of ship emission models using Agrawal-Moldanova datasets'}。
                        本次是第3次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为指出船舶PM排放需按化学组分拆解评估，欧洲硫指令（硫含量≤0.1%）显著降低港口PM排放，强制模型需考虑位置/负载动态变化。,理由是揭示法规对建模的关键影响，提出PM化学组分分析新维度，含具体政策指标。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Chemical constituents of PM', 'European sulphur directive', 'Harbor emission modeling']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'In previous emission inventories of marine traffic, constant load points and fixed emission factors have commonly been used and harbor emissions have been neglected. However, in order to obtain more accurate predictions, at least the dependence of shipping emissions on the location of the shipping routes, the actual speeds and engine loads have also to be taken into account. Changes of emission factors are especially important in port areas, as the European sulphur directive (EC/2005/33) states that the fuel used in EU harbor areas must not contain more than  $0.1\\%$  sulphur since the beginning of 2010. This directive will have a significant impact on the PM emissions from ships at berth, which should be taken into account by any model used in local scale modeling of harbor regions. There is an urgent need to reliably evaluate the effects of various policy options that focus on reducing the PM emissions from ships. The health and climatic influences can be substantially different for the various chemical constituents of PM; the modeling should therefore disaggregate the chemical fractions of PM emissions from ships.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003453, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'OC/EC fractionation techniques for non-vehicular PM2.5 sources'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为汽油车和柴油车排放的PM2.5组分中EC比例差异最大（汽油车13.07%，柴油车25.17%），OC占比均超50%，水溶性离子占比相近。,理由是包含图7展示的具体PM2.5组分数据，且明确量化了两种车辆排放差异，具有直接可比性。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PM2.5 chemical speciation', 'OC/EC ratio', 'On-road source apportionment']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The components in  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  could be divided into five categories: OC, EC, water-soluble ions, inorganic elements and other components. Each percentages of these five categories in the particulate matter were calculated, and the results were shown in Fig. 7. The proportions of OC, EC, water-soluble ions and inorganic elements in gasoline vehicles were  $53.93\\%$ $13.07\\%$ $13.12\\%$  and  $0.30\\%$  respectively. The proportions of OC, EC, water-soluble ions and inorganic elements in diesel vehicles were  $51.15\\%$ $25.17\\%$ $14.53\\%$  and  $0.44\\%$  respectively. Thus, the largest difference in the proportion of various components in  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emitted from gasoline and diesel vehicles was EC.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 5, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'BC and OC emission data are not available as emission grid maps within the MACC-II data set, but the PM grid maps are accompanied by a recommendation on the PM composition describing the carbonaceous profiles per SNAP code and country. This so-called PM split table (per SNAP code and country) of TNO (Visschedijk et al., 2009) is used to derive the BC and OC from  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$  and  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emission grid maps (see Kuenen et al. (2014) for details).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_001305, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'CEMS data fusion with atmospheric transport models'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为该研究开发了两步反演方法：首先推断排放量，输入CMAQ模型生成初始条件；随后将优化排放量传递为下个窗口先验值。此方法通过TROPOMI HCHO同化优化NMVOC排放，具有迭代优化和误差传播特性。,理由是核心方法论描述清晰，包含实验系统(Feng et al.系列研究)和可扩展框架，具备深挖价值。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['two-step inversion', 'TROPOMI HCHO assimilation', 'iterative emission optimization']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'observations, respectively (Feng et al., 2022; Feng et al., 2020). The inversion process follows a two-step procedure within each inversion window, in which the emissions are inferred first and then input into the CMAQ model to simulate initial conditions of the next window. Meanwhile, the optimized emissions are transferred to the next window as prior emissions. -The two-step inversion strategy facilitates error propagation and iterative emission optimization, which have proven the superiority and robustness of our system in estimating emissions (Feng et al., 2023). In this study, we extended the data frame to include the assimilation of TROPOMI HCHO retrievals for optimizing NMVOC emissions. Concise descriptions of the forecast model, data assimilation approach, and experimental settings follow.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

The figure highlights the dominance of organic carbon in PM2.5 emissions and a significant difference in elemental carbon between gasoline and diesel vehicles, important for understanding vehicle pollution.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_001303, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'TROPOMI HCHO assimilation techniques for NMVOC emission optimization'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为开发非线性联合反演方法，通过TROPOMI HCHO和地面NO2观测同时优化NOx/NMVOC排放，解决传统研究中忽略的化学不确定性，显著提升臭氧形成过程分析精度。,理由是创新性突破传统单物种反演局限，明确揭示多污染物协同作用机制，且直接关联政策制定（减排政策）,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['nonlinear joint inversion', 'process analysis', 'multi-species constraints']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Most studies regarding the inversion of NMVOC emissions or its impact on  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  neglected the uncertainties associated with  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ -dependent production or loss of NMVOC oxidation and  $\\mathrm{O}_3$ . An iteratively nonlinear joint inversion of  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  and NMVOCs using multi-species observations is expected to minimize the uncertainties in their emissions and is well-suited to address the intricate relationship among VOC- $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ - $\\mathrm{O}_3$ . In this study, we extended the Regional multi-Air Pollutant Assimilation System (RAPAS) upon the ensemble Kalman filter (EnKF) assimilation algorithm to enhance the optimization of NMVOC emissions over China, utilizing the TROPOspheric Monitoring Instrument (TROPOMI) HCHO retrievals with high spatial coverage and resolution. To more accurately quantify the impact of NMVOC emissions on  $\\mathrm{O}_3$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions were simultaneously adjusted using nationwide in-situ  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  observations. Process analysis was subsequently employed to quantify various chemical pathways associated with  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  formation and loss. Through a top-down constraint on both emissions, this study aims to offer a more scientific insight into the consequences of optimizing NMVOC emissions on  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  and contribute to the development of appropriate emission reduction policies.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003385, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'OC/EC fractionation techniques for non-vehicular PM2.5 sources'}。

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为,理由是聚焦PM2.5组分而非VOCs，脱离核心研究方向,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The components in  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  could be divided into five categories: OC, EC, water-soluble ions, inorganic elements and other components. Each percentages of these five categories in the particulate matter were calculated, and the results were shown in Fig. 7. The proportions of OC, EC, water-soluble ions and inorganic elements in gasoline vehicles were  $53.93\\%$ $13.07\\%$ $13.12\\%$  and  $0.30\\%$  respectively. The proportions of OC, EC, water-soluble ions and inorganic elements in diesel vehicles were  $51.15\\%$ $25.17\\%$ $14.53\\%$  and  $0.44\\%$  respectively. Thus, the largest difference in the proportion of various components in  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emitted from gasoline and diesel vehicles was EC.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

The dominant sources differ across metrics; combustion sources lead in MR, while industrial sources dominate L_{OH} and SOAP, and vehicle emissions are highest for OFP.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_001394, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'TROPOMI HCHO assimilation techniques for NMVOC emission optimization'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为通过集成EnKF同化算法和TROPOMI HCHO观测数据优化中国NMVOC排放，并同步调整NOx排放以考量VOC-NOx-O3化学反馈机制，显著改进了地表臭氧污染的CMAQ-IRR模拟精度。,理由是核心研究方法明确指向关键模型框架（EnKF+RAPAS+CMAQ），提供具体数据集（MEIC/MEGANv2.1）和时间范围（2022年8月），具备深度挖掘价值,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['EnKF assimilation', 'VOC-NOx-O3 feedback', 'CMAQ-IRR']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'In this study, we extended the RAPAS assimilation system with the EnKF assimilation algorithm to optimize NMVOC emissions using the TROPOMI HCHO retrievals. Taking the MEIC 2020 for anthropogenic emissions and MEGANv2.1 output for biogenic sources as a priori, NMVOC emissions over China in August 2022 were inferred. Importantly, we implicitly took the chemical feedback among VOC-  $\\mathrm{NO}_x\\mathrm{-O}_3$  into account by simultaneously adjusting  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  emissions using nationwide in-situ  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  observations. Furthermore, we quantified the impact of NMVOC emission inversion on surface  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  pollution using the CMAQ-IRR model.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_001312, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'TROPOMI HCHO assimilation techniques for NMVOC emission optimization'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为采用分层优化策略（先约束NMVOC总排放再分解物种），有效降低自由度；模型-观测时空匹配技术（水平采样/垂直积分）提升数据可比性。,理由是提供重要方法细节但缺乏突破性结论，对理解整体研究有上下文价值,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['lumped NMVOC optimization', 'spatiotemporal alignment', 'background error reduction']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'State variables for emissions include  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  and NMVOCs. To reduce the degree of freedom in the analysis and avoid the difficulty associated with estimating spatiotemporal variations in background errors for individual species, we focus on optimizing the lumped total NMVOC emissions. During the forecast step, we differentiate individual NMVOC species emissions from the total NMVOC emissions using bottom-up statistical information. For a consistent comparison between simulations and observations, model-simulated  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  were diagnosed at the time and location of surface  $\\mathrm{NO}_2$  measurements, whereas model-simulated HCHO was horizontally sampled to align with TROPOMI HCHO VCD retrievals, and subsequently integrated vertically.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为重复chunk_003374内容：检测10辆车的PM2.5中21种无机元素，排放因子数据见Fig.6a-b。,理由是与chunk_003374完全冗余，无新增信息，建议剪除以避免重复分析。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emitted from 10 typical vehicles were analyzed by ICP-MS, and 21 inorganic elements including Na, Mg, K, Ca, V, Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, Ni, Cu, Zn, Ga, As, Rb, Sr, Ag, Cd, Cs, Ba and Pb were detected. The emission factors of inorganic elements under different emission standards for gasoline vehicles were shown in Fig. 6a and diesel vehicles were shown in Fig. 6b.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为研究指出船舶PM排放建模的关键瓶颈：缺乏发动机不同负载/燃料下PM化学成分的实验数据，建议补充环境参数(海冰/洋流)对排放的影响建模。,理由是明确揭示研究空白并提出现实可操作的研究方向，具备方法学创新潜力。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['composition-resolved PM', 'engine load analysis', 'marine current impact']。

The emissions of the chemical components of PM should be analyzed at various engine loads, and using various fuels, in order to be able to more comprehensively analyze and evaluate the performance of the modeling approaches. Further research is also needed to model various environmental effects, such as the influence of sea ice and marine currents; the former has'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002160, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'comparative validation of ship emission models using Agrawal-Moldanova datasets'}。
                        本次是第3次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 10, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为基于AIS的高分辨率排放模型STEAM2成功扩展至PM/CO，涵盖引擎负载/硫含量/波浪等多因子影响，能分解有机碳/元素碳等PM组分，地理可视化波罗的海排放热点。,理由是完整描述模型方法论创新点和验证过程，提及关键实验验证和空间分布成果。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['AIS-based emission mapping', 'PM composition disaggregating', 'Engine load dependencies']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Abstract. A method is presented for the evaluation of the exhaust emissions of marine traffic, based on the messages provided by the Automatic Identification System (AIS), which enable the positioning of ship emissions with a high spatial resolution (typically a few tens of metres). The model also takes into account the detailed technical data of each individual vessel. The previously developed model was applicable for evaluating the emissions of  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$ ,  $\\mathrm{SO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$  and  $\\mathrm{CO}_{2}$ . This paper addresses a substantial extension of the modelling system, to allow also for the mass-based emissions of particulate matter (PM) and carbon monoxide (CO). The presented Ship Traffic Emissions Assessment Model (STEAM2) allows for the influences of accurate travel routes and ship speed, engine load, fuel sulphur content, multiengine setups, abatement methods and waves. We address in particular the modeling of the influence on the emissions of both engine load and the sulphur content of the fuel. The presented methodology can be used to evaluate the total PM emissions, and those of organic carbon, elemental carbon, ash and hydrated sulphate. We have evaluated the performance of the extended model against available experimental data on engine power, fuel consumption and the composition-resolved emissions of PM. We have also compared the annually averaged emission values with those of the corresponding EMEP inventory. As example results, the geographical distributions of the emissions of PM and CO are presented for the marine regions of the Baltic Sea surrounding the Danish Straits.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_001277, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'comparative analysis of CMB and PMF receptor models for OC/EC source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图8显示苯排放源强度实测值在12个时段平均高于模型预测26%，揭示交通排放模型在特定工况下的系统性偏差,理由是量化对比图证明模型低估实际交通排放，且给出精确偏差值（26%），具修正价值,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Source strength discrepancy', 'Stage-specific emission bias', 'NMHC measurement validation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'During the BAB II campaign, over 50 NMHCs were detected (Petrea et al., 2005). The source strengths of 21 NMHC compounds could be calculated and were compared with model calculations by Kuhlwein and Friedrich (2005). For benzene the comparison of measured and model-calculated source strengths are given in Fig. 8 for 12 time intervals between 2 and  $4\\mathrm{h}$  duration. There are cases of over- and underestimated model-calculated source strength compared to the measurements. On average the measurements are  $26\\%$  higher than the model calculations for highest stage 3.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002170, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'comparative validation of ship emission models using Agrawal-Moldanova datasets'}。
                        本次是第3次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为研究提出新模型STEAM2，计划对比原模型(STEAM)、EMEP清单并通过实验数据验证。,理由是包含可深挖路径：提供模型名称(STEAM2)、对比方法论和实验验证方案。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['STEAM2 model', 'onboard engine measurements', 'model validation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The objectives of this article are (i) to present the principles and mathematical structure of the extended ship emission model (STEAM2), (ii) to compare the predictions of the extended model with those of the original model (STEAM), regarding the instantaneous power and fuel consumption, using onboard engine measurements, (iii) to compare the annually averaged emission values briefly with those of the corresponding EMEP inventory, (iv) to evaluate the extended model against available experimental data, and (v) to illustrate the capabilities of the model by presenting some selected numerical results.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003405, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'ICP-MS characterization of inorganic element fingerprints in vehicle PM2.5 emissions'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 5, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为重复内容：研究武汉机动车PM2.5排放特征及其组分分析方法。,理由是与chunk_003337完全重复，属信息冗余，无独立价值。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'from vehicles became outstanding in Wuhan. In order to find out the characteristics of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations and associated chemical components from on-road emissions in urban areas in Wuhan, which was located in the central and southern China and the climates were high temperature and humidity, ten typical motor vehicles were selected to carry out this research.  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emission factors and emission concentration characteristics of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  from motor vehicles under different emission standards at different operating speeds were performed. The characteristics of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  components, including carbonaceous components, water-soluble ions and inorganic elements, were detected as well.  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  composition spectrum of vehicle emission in Wuhan would be finally obtained. Results of this study would help formulating measures for the reduction of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emissions from vehicles in Wuhan, and provide a reference for  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution control of motor vehicles in similar types.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_004254, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'VOC reactivity-based source apportionment strategies for SOAP quantification'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为研究限制包括VOC化学属性未知性（如大气降阶速率常数）、建模低估（如PMF模型因物种限制影响OFP计算）和SOA模拟不确定性（如VBS方法的低估）。,理由是提供关键背景信息但无具体paper ID或量化新深挖路径；作为知识背景对后续问题作上下文参考。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['VOC degradation models', 'PMF model uncertainty']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "The limitations of this study were from several aspects: one is the limited known chemistry properties of VOC species; the other is the underestimation of the current modelling; and the third is the assumption of the PMF model. For instance, the ozone reactivity scales for 118 VOC species under different  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  conditions were summarized by Carter (2013). Similarly, Atkinson and Arey (2003) summarized the atmospheric degradation of about 190 VOC species (known as the rate constant  $k_{OH}$ ). A list of the SOAPs relative to toluene for 113 VOC species was also reported by Derwent et al. (2010). Despite the great efforts have been made to study the photochemical characteristics of the VOC species, some VOC species' properties are still unknown. They may be important to the atmospheric reactivity, ozone, and secondary aerosol formation potentials. Limited species (i.e., 33 species in this study) introduced into the PMF model suggested the underestimation of  $\\mathrm{L_{OH}}$ , OFP, and SOAP. For SOA modelling, the SOA yield method using chamber study or simulation using volatility basis sets (VBS) underestimated the SOA mass (Chen et al., 2017). For the estimation of OFP, despite the MIR method considers the chemical mechanisms and impacts of the  $\\mathrm{VOC} / \\mathrm{NO}_x$  ratio on ozone production, it may also introduce simulation uncertainties (Ran et al., 2009)."}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_004249, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'VOC reactivity-based source apportionment strategies for SOAP quantification'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为工业源贡献了32.8%的二次有机气溶胶潜力（SOAP），而车辆排放仅占25.8%，后者可能由于物种输入的局限性被低估。,理由是讨论SOAP来源分配的核心数据，引用多条具体研究（如Wu and Xie, 2017）作为潜力语义参考点。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['SOAP source apportionment', 'Industrial VOC contribution']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'For SOAP, the industrial sources owned the largest contribution  $(32.8\\%)$ . This finding was similar to the research that industrial sources accounted for the largest proportion of SOAP in China based on emission inventory method (Wu and Xie, 2017). While it was different from a report in the UK that road transport contributed  $45\\%$  of SOAP in 2000 (Derwent et al., 2010). A field measurement also suggested that the chemical and paint industries contributed most to the SOAP (Mo et al., 2017). However, the vehicle emissions in this study contributed less to the total SOAP with a percentage of  $25.8\\%$ . This was likely due to the limited VOC species input into the SOAP calculation, which underestimated the contributions of vehicle emissions as well as other sources.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_004179, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'receptor models for PM2.5 source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第4次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 6, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为PMF模型处理环境VOCs源解析的优势：支持非负因子分解、误差估计及缺失值处理，数学表达为X=G·F矩阵分解,理由是基础模型原理描述，包含关键算法参考文献(Paatero 1994)，模型结构表达清晰,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Positive matrix factorization', 'receptor modeling']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Positive matrix factorization (PMF) model is widely used in ambient VOCs source apportionment (Bari and Kindzierski, 2018; Zheng et al., 2018; Zheng et al., 2019). It can produce a better fit for the data and provide non-negative factors, error estimates, and better data treatment including handling missing values and values below the detection limits (Paatero and Tapper, 1994). Briefly, the PMF model decomposes a receptor sample matrix  $(i \\times j$  dimension) into contribution matrix  $(i \\times k)$  and factor matrix  $(k \\times j)$ :'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_004164, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'VOC reactivity-based source apportionment strategies for SOAP quantification'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为冬季PM2.5污染控制需关联OFP和SOAP源分配数据，排放清单方法（如引用Wu et al., 2017）因外源参考不确定性限制了本地数据准确性。,理由是直接论及PM2.5控制核心机制，且隐含本地化深挖线索（如Huang et al., 2014 ID）。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['OFP estimation barriers', 'Local emission factors']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Currently, stringent controls on VOCs are needed to mitigate  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution in winter (Huang et al., 2014). The estimation of ozone formation potential (OFP) and SOA of each VOC source is vital before cost-effective strategies can be carried out. Indeed, many researches have been done on determining the most reactive VOC sources. Generally, there are two methods to estimate the OFP or SOA formation potential (SOAP) of each VOC source. One is the speciated VOC emission inventory (Zheng et al., 2009; Liang et al., 2017; Wu et al., 2017; Wu and Xie, 2017) and the other refers to the field measurement of VOC profiles from source emissions. The emission inventory method is sensitive to emission factors, and most of these speciated inventory studies in China always adopted emission factors from studies conducted in foreign countries or other regions, which had large uncertainty (Zhang et al., 2013; Wang, 2014; Wu and Xie, 2017). The local VOC emission inventory is still insufficient (Li et al., 2017), mainly due to the complexity of obtaining emission factors and accurate source activity data.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_004255, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'receptor models for PM2.5 source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第3次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为PMF模型在VOCs源解析中的四大不确定性假设，特别指出VOCs光化学反应会干扰源解析结果,理由是说明PMF模型核心局限性，提供关键参考文献(Belis 2013/Yuan 2012)，适合作方法学背景,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PMF uncertainty', 'VOC photochemistry interference']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'For the PMF model derived uncertainty, it comes from four assumptions: (1) the source profiles do not change significantly over time; (2) the species do not react chemically or undergo physical processes; (3) the collected data are consistent with the conceptual model and represent the studied geographical area; and (4) equivalent/comparable analytical methods are applied to the receptor site throughout the study (Belis et al., 2013). However, the photochemistry of VOCs in the ambient air made it difficult to separate the sources derived from the PMF model and attention should be paid to the interpretation of the sources derived from the PMF model (Yuan et al., 2012).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_004252, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'PMF model quantification of SOAP contribution from VOC sources'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为PM2.5浓度升高时，工业源对VOC混合比贡献升至27.3%，对OH损失率、OFP和SOAP的贡献分别达56.2%、48.4%和57.0%，成为主导污染源。,理由是量化了PM2.5与工业源贡献的正相关趋势（40.8→89.6 ppbv），图解数据(Fig.7)验证污染机制，提供关键过渡阈值。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PM2.5-VOC coupling', 'Industrial source dominance', 'Pollution escalation mechanism']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'To better understand the differences in levels and reactivity of VOC sources under different air quality, the  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  levels were classified into several groups and the source contributions, OH loss rate, OFP, and SOAP of VOCs were summarized in Fig. 7. Generally, with the increase of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  levels from clean to heavy pollution, the VOC levels also increased from  $40.8 \\pm 17.6$  ppbv to  $89.6 \\pm 26.3$  ppbv. The same phenomenon was also reported elsewhere (Han et al., 2017; Liu et al., 2017; Hui et al., 2019). Fig. 7 clearly shows that the high  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution was characterized by an increase of industrial sources, which accounted for up to  $27.3\\%$ ,  $56.2\\%$ ,  $48.4\\%$ , and  $57.0\\%$  of VOCs mixing ratio, OH loss rate, OFP, and SOAP, respectively. The results here were similar to a previous study that the percentage of industrial sources increased significantly with the increase in VOC levels and this source dominated the VOC origins during an entire severe pollution episode (Hui et al.,'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_004617, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'ICP-MS characterization of inorganic element fingerprints in vehicle PM2.5 emissions'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图6显示汽油/柴油车在国III-V标准下PM2.5中Na、Mg、K、Ca的排放因子显著高于其他无机元素，主要来源于燃料添加剂，且柴油车排放普遍高于汽油车，随标准升级排放降低。,理由是图表量化展示关键元素排放特征与标准关联，含具体数据趋势（如国III柴油车K排放达100.10μg/km），且元数据提供完整论文ID和图表引用路径。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['inorganic elements emission factors', 'China emission standards', 'fuel additives impact']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Figure 6 illustrates the emission factors of 21 inorganic elements in PM2.5 from gasoline and diesel vehicles under China III, IV, and V standards. The figure shows higher emission factors for Na, Mg, K, and Ca, indicating significant contributions from fuel additives, with lower emissions for other elements from engine wear and catalytic particles.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图6展示不同排放标准下汽油车(图6a)和柴油车(图6b)的21种无机元素(包括Na, Fe, Zn, Pb等)的PM2.5排放因子定量数据，通过ICP-MS检测获得。,理由是包含关键图表(Fig.6)及具体元素排放因子数据，可直接比较车型差异，具有高挖掘价值。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['ICP-MS', 'inorganic elements emission', 'vehicle emission standard']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emitted from 10 typical vehicles were analyzed by ICP-MS, and 21 inorganic elements including Na, Mg, K, Ca, V, Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, Ni, Cu, Zn, Ga, As, Rb, Sr, Ag, Cd, Cs, Ba and Pb were detected. The emission factors of inorganic elements under different emission standards for gasoline vehicles were shown in Fig. 6a and diesel vehicles were shown in Fig. 6b.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为该段落仅声明结果详见其他子研究，未提供实测与模型对比的实质数据或结论,理由是纯文献引用无独立见解，未包含核心图表或具体数据对比结果,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'As this paper summarises the BAB II results and compares measured and model calculated emissions, for detailed information about the determination of source strengths, traffic census data and model development look up the specific contributions within this special issue. For the overall project description see Corsmeier et al. (2005). The source strengths for CO and  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  are given by Kohler et al. (2005), those for NMHC compounds by Petrea et al. (2005). PM emissions are investigated by Rosenbohm et al. (2005) and Imhof et al. (2005) and finally the emission model calculations and the traffic measurements are presented by Kuhlwein and Friedrich (2005).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为PM质量浓度测量因缺乏粒子密度数据存在较大不确定性,理由是聚焦测量技术局限，与PM2.5健康效应关联度低，且未提供解决方案,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PM mass concentration uncertainty']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'A critical point was the determination of mass concentrations for PM. As the particle densities and particle volumes were not available from measurements, assumptions would have been necessary, which would have led to a large uncertainty of the results. PM measurements during BAB II were limited to number concentrations. Considering the influence of PM on the human health, further investigations should focus on the accurate determination of mass concentrations of PM.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为HCHO偏差校正导致NMVOC排放估计增加12.8%，证明卫星反演误差显著影响排放优化结果（图S1），模型分辨率优势规避代表性误差。,理由是补充分析数据不确定性来源，对主结论起支持作用但独立价值有限,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['empirical bias-correction', 'retrieval uncertainty']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "sensitivity experiment in which HCHO columns were empirically bias-corrected according to the error characteristics described above (Figure S1). The posterior emissions increased by  $12.8\\%$  compared to those in the base experiment (EMDA), indicating that the existing retrieval error in HCHO measurements likely exerts an influence on the estimation of NMVOC emissions. -The representation error can be disregarded because the model's resolution significantly surpasses that of the TROPOMI pixels."}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

In order to find out the characteristics of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations and associated chemical components from on-road emissions in urban areas in Wuhan, which was located in the central and southern China and the climates were high temperature and humidity, ten typical motor vehicles were selected to carry out this research.  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emission factors and emission concentration characteristics of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  from motor vehicles under different emission standards at different operating speeds were performed. The characteristics of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  components, including carbonaceous components, water-soluble ions and inorganic elements, were detected as well.  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  composition spectrum of vehicle emission in Wuhan would be finally obtained. Results of this study would help formulating measures for the reduction of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emissions from vehicles in Wuhan, and provide a reference for  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution control of motor vehicles in similar types.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为船舶PM排放组分（如黑碳与元素碳）存在技术测量差异，固定发动机载荷模型（Corbett et al., 2010）忽略负载影响导致不确定性。,理由是与主要问题（VOC源分配和PM2.5控制）关联度低；信息聚焦船舶局部技术规范。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['BC versus EC measurements', 'Ship engine emissions']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Information is currently scarce especially regarding the geographical distribution and chemical composition of PM emissions arising from ship traffic, and the chemical composition details have not commonly been introduced to global inventories of ship emissions. Corbett et al. (2010) subdivided PM from marine traffic into organic carbon and black carbon. They did not allow for the dependency on engine load of the constituents of PM; instead, fixed, predetermined loads were used for main and auxiliary engines. However, the emissions of both the various chemical components of PM and CO are sensitive to engine load. The classifications of PM components, and the detailed definitions of such classes also can vary, depending on the measurement techniques used. For instance, the experimental methods using absorptive techniques often provide black carbon (Eyring et al., 2010), but chemical techniques report a division to elemental and organic carbon. Clearly, black carbon and elemental carbon cannot be used as synonymous expressions, since there are components of organic carbon, which also absorb light (e.g. Andreae and Gelencsér, 2006).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_004616, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'OC/EC ratio differentiation between gasoline and diesel vehicles using PEMS'}。
                        本次是第3次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为散点图展示了汽油车和柴油车在不同排放标准（国III-V）下PM2.5中OC/EC比值的变化规律，汽油车的OC/EC比（平均6.89）显著高于柴油车（3.12），且排放标准升级使汽油车OC占比下降（国IV:10.2→国V:5.3），柴油车则呈上升趋势（国III:1.5→国V:4.9）。,理由是核心结果图表直接揭示PM2.5碳组分与车辆类型的关联性，且包含具体量化数据和排放标准演变趋势，Metadata中提供图4引用路径,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['OC/EC ratio', 'carbonaceous components', 'emission standards', 'gasoline vs diesel']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The figure shows OC/EC ratios of PM2.5 from gasoline and diesel vehicles across various emission standards, highlighting differences in carbonaceous emissions. The OC/EC ratio indicates the source of PM2.5, showing higher organic content in emissions from gasoline vehicles and illustrating how emission standards impact carbonaceous components.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002317, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'PM chemical constituent disaggregation in AIS-based ship emission models'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为船舶排放模型可扩展至其他海域，但依赖卫星AIS数据和国际合作以实现全球精确排放清单构建。,理由是提供模型扩展的可行性与局限，但缺乏具体排放数据或量化结果，适合作为背景信息保留。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['satellite-based AIS', 'global emission inventories']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The model presented can be extended for other marine regions besides the Baltic Sea, if the model input data will be available, including especially the AIS data. However, the AIS data cannot be received across extensive sea areas, unless a satellite-based AIS reception is used. A flexible international cooperation between maritime authorities would therefore be most valuable to be able to construct more accurate emission inventories on a global scale.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_004167, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'PMF model quantification of SOAP contribution from VOC sources'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 6, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为概述研究方法框架：基于冬季VOC监测数据计算OH损耗率/OFP/SOAP，通过PMF模型溯源并对比污染期差异,理由是仅重复描述方法论框架，无新数据或结论性发现,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Therefore, this study attempted to comprehensively estimate the reactivity, OFP, and SOAP of different ambient VOC sources by the PMF model. The hourly ambient VOCs monitoring data during wintertime from a megacity in Central China was adopted. The levels, compositions, and diurnal variations of VOCs were firstly studied.  $\\mathrm{L_{OH}}$ , OFP, and SOAP of VOC species were then calculated. The VOC sources were identified with the PMF model. The  $\\mathrm{L_{OH}}$ , OFP, and SOAP of each identified VOC source were further quantified. Finally, the differences in source variations between clean and pollution episodes were discussed.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002254, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'chemical constituent-disaggregated PM emission modeling'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图5展示硫酸盐、有机碳(OC)等PM组分的排放因子数学模型推导结果，其中OC排放拟合自Agrawal和Petzold研究，且硫酸盐排放依赖燃料硫含量。,理由是关键图表(Fig.5)揭示PM组分建模的数学方法及燃料硫依赖机制，支持深度模型复现。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PM component modeling', 'fuel sulphur dependency', 'emission fitting']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'been modeled based on the variation of SFOC. An additional dependency for OC is used as given in Eq. (13c) for which results from Agrawal et al. (2008a, b, 2010) and Petzold et al. (2010) were used and fitted to a mathematical form (see Fig. 5). The emissions of all PM components are modeled based on the variations of SFOC and instantaneous power, and in addition the emission factors of sulphate and associated water are dependent on the fuel sulphur content.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_001327, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'TROPOMI HCHO assimilation techniques for NMVOC emission optimization'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图2揭示TROPOMI约束后中国NMVOC排放空间重分布：从全国热点转为聚焦NCP/YRD/PRD/SCB等人为活动区，显示排放优化与区域经济密度的强关联。,理由是关键空间分布图展示卫星约束如何重塑排放热点，对区域治理具政策启示,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Emission spatial redistribution', 'Anthropogenic NMVOC', 'Biogenic emission hotspots']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Figure 2 shows the spatial distribution of temporally averaged prior and posterior NMVOC emissions, along with their differences, in NMVOC emissions. Hotspots of prior NMVOC emissions were prevalent across much of central and southern China. However, posterior NMVOC emissions were predominantly concentrated in the NCP, Yangtze River Delta (YRD), PRD, and Sichuan Basin (SCB), characterized by high levels of anthropogenic activity. High emissions are also located in parts of central and southern China with warm climate favorable for emitting biogenic NMVOCs. Employing TROPOMI HCHO observations as constraints led to widespread decreases'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_004161, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'PMF model quantification of SOAP contribution from VOC sources'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为研究量化了五种VOC来源对大气反应性的贡献：溶剂使用(11.6%)、汽油蒸发(14.2%)、燃烧源(39.0%)、汽车排放(22.5%)、工业源(12.6%)；工业源是OH损耗率(32.2%)和SOAP形成(32.8%)主要贡献者，汽车排放主导OFP(27.8%),理由是提供关键量化数据及污染控制策略建议，含具体PMF模型应用细节，paperid信息支持深挖,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Positive Matrix Factorization', 'Ozone Formation Potential', 'Secondary Organic Aerosol Potential']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Volatile organic compounds (VOCs) are important contributors to atmospheric chemical reactivity rate  $(\\mathrm{L_{OH}})$ , ozone formation potential (OFP), and secondary organic aerosol formation potential (SOAP). The purpose of this study was to determine the contributions of different VOC sources to  $\\mathrm{L_{OH}}$ , OFP, and SOAP using positive matrix factorization (PMF) model. Hourly observation of ambient VOCs at a megacity of Central China was conducted for one month in winter. The  $\\mathrm{L_{OH}}$ , OFP, and SOAP of VOC species were firstly estimated. The PMF model was then used to apportion their sources. Five VOC sources including solvent usage, gasoline evaporation, combustion sources, vehicle emissions, and industrial sources were apportioned with their average contributions of  $11.6\\%$ ,  $14.2\\%$ ,  $39.0\\%$ ,  $22.5\\%$ , and  $12.6\\%$ , respectively. Industrial sources were the highest contributors to the  $\\mathrm{L_{OH}}$  and SOAP with average contributions of  $32.2\\%$  and  $32.8\\%$ , respectively, while vehicle emissions contributed most to the OFP  $(27.8\\%)$ . This study highlighted that the VOCs and ozone pollution control should give priority to the reactivity (OFP and SOAP) based strategies rather than concentration contribution-based strategies.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002161, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'PM chemical constituent disaggregation in AIS-based ship emission models'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 6, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为船运硫限制减少PM排放（主要成分为硫酸盐)，但洗涤后处理技术（如引用Corbett et al., 2010）在MarPol Annex VI下更有效控制残余PM。,理由是中等价值但非直接核心；作为法规影响背景信息保留；无强深挖线索（仅泛泛引用）。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Scrubbing systems for PM', 'IMO Marpol compliance']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Emissions of PM from shipping have a significant impact on ambient air quality in densely populated coastal areas and these may substantially contribute to detrimental impacts on human health (Corbett et al., 2007). Stringent limits for the sulphur content of marine fuels and  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$ -emissions are expected to reduce the emissions from ships. The PM emissions are simultaneously reduced, as a major part of PM emissions is in the form of sulphate. However, sulphur content reductions will not eradicate PM emissions completely (Winnes and Fridell, 2010b; Fridell et al., 2008; Cooper, 2001, 2003; Kasper et al., 2007; Buhaug et al., 2009), even if the global fleet would switch to low sulphur fuel. The emissions of PM can also be reduced by using after-treatment techniques, which will remove a significant part of the PM emissions (Corbett et al., 2010; European Commission Directorate General Environment, 2005) Scrubbing systems from engine manufacturers have been commonly applied to diesel power plants on land, but their commercial installations to ships have been scarce. This is expected to change, after the the implementation of the stringent sulphur limits included in the revised Marpol Annex VI of the IMO (International Maritime Organization, 1998).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_001297, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'CEMS data fusion with atmospheric transport models'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 3, 'credibility': 5},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为无实质内容，仅为关键词罗列（NMVOC排放、臭氧污染等）。,理由是信息密度极低，无具体发现或数据支撑，无法提取有效洞察。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'NMVOC emissions,  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  pollution, Emission inversion, HCHO column retrievals, Data assimilation'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003027, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'comparative analysis of CMB and PMF receptor models for OC/EC source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为在排放清单整合中，当BC和OC排放总和超过PM₂.₅时，会导致化学传输模型出现负PMfine排放值；该研究采用将PM₂.₅调整为BC与OC排放总和的校正方法。,理由是内容涉及多源排放清单整合的关键技术问题，提供具体数据冲突解决方案，尽管未提及可深挖的图表或论文ID，但具有方法论参考价值。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PMfine', 'emission inventory reconciliation', 'negative emissions adjustment', 'ANL-India', 'REAS2']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Second, we used BC and OC emissions from ANL-India but used  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  and  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$  emissions from REAS2. In certain grids, the sum of BC and OC emissions may exceed  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emissions because the two inventories may use different activity data, emission factors, and spatial proxies. The so-called "PMfine" species in chemical transport models are usually calculated by subtracting BC and OC emissions from total  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emissions, leading to negative emissions of PMfine in those grids. In this case, we adjusted the emissions of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  to the sum of BC and OC emissions for each sector.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002316, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'comparative validation of ship emission models using Agrawal-Moldanova datasets'}。
                        本次是第3次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为指出船舶PM排放需按化学组分拆解评估，欧洲硫指令（硫含量≤0.1%）显著降低港口PM排放，强制模型需考虑位置/负载动态变化。,理由是揭示法规对建模的关键影响，提出PM化学组分分析新维度，含具体政策指标。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Chemical constituents of PM', 'European sulphur directive', 'Harbor emission modeling']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'In previous emission inventories of marine traffic, constant load points and fixed emission factors have commonly been used and harbor emissions have been neglected. However, in order to obtain more accurate predictions, at least the dependence of shipping emissions on the location of the shipping routes, the actual speeds and engine loads have also to be taken into account. Changes of emission factors are especially important in port areas, as the European sulphur directive (EC/2005/33) states that the fuel used in EU harbor areas must not contain more than  $0.1\\%$  sulphur since the beginning of 2010. This directive will have a significant impact on the PM emissions from ships at berth, which should be taken into account by any model used in local scale modeling of harbor regions. There is an urgent need to reliably evaluate the effects of various policy options that focus on reducing the PM emissions from ships. The health and climatic influences can be substantially different for the various chemical constituents of PM; the modeling should therefore disaggregate the chemical fractions of PM emissions from ships.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003453, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'OC/EC fractionation techniques for non-vehicular PM2.5 sources'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为汽油车和柴油车排放的PM2.5组分中EC比例差异最大（汽油车13.07%，柴油车25.17%），OC占比均超50%，水溶性离子占比相近。,理由是包含图7展示的具体PM2.5组分数据，且明确量化了两种车辆排放差异，具有直接可比性。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PM2.5 chemical speciation', 'OC/EC ratio', 'On-road source apportionment']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The components in  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  could be divided into five categories: OC, EC, water-soluble ions, inorganic elements and other components. Each percentages of these five categories in the particulate matter were calculated, and the results were shown in Fig. 7. The proportions of OC, EC, water-soluble ions and inorganic elements in gasoline vehicles were  $53.93\\%$ $13.07\\%$ $13.12\\%$  and  $0.30\\%$  respectively. The proportions of OC, EC, water-soluble ions and inorganic elements in diesel vehicles were  $51.15\\%$ $25.17\\%$ $14.53\\%$  and  $0.44\\%$  respectively. Thus, the largest difference in the proportion of various components in  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emitted from gasoline and diesel vehicles was EC.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002678, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'comparative analysis of CMB and PMF receptor models for OC/EC source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 5, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为采用TNO的PM组分拆分表从PM网格图中推导BC/OC排放，建立基于SNAP编码和国家的碳质气溶胶映射方法,理由是提供BC/OC排放量化方法但未展示结果图表，适合作背景技术参考,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PM split table', 'Carbonaceous profile mapping', 'SNAP-code speciation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'BC and OC emission data are not available as emission grid maps within the MACC-II data set, but the PM grid maps are accompanied by a recommendation on the PM composition describing the carbonaceous profiles per SNAP code and country. This so-called PM split table (per SNAP code and country) of TNO (Visschedijk et al., 2009) is used to derive the BC and OC from  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$  and  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emission grid maps (see Kuenen et al. (2014) for details).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_001305, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'CEMS data fusion with atmospheric transport models'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为该研究开发了两步反演方法：首先推断排放量，输入CMAQ模型生成初始条件；随后将优化排放量传递为下个窗口先验值。此方法通过TROPOMI HCHO同化优化NMVOC排放，具有迭代优化和误差传播特性。,理由是核心方法论描述清晰，包含实验系统(Feng et al.系列研究)和可扩展框架，具备深挖价值。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['two-step inversion', 'TROPOMI HCHO assimilation', 'iterative emission optimization']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'observations, respectively (Feng et al., 2022; Feng et al., 2020). The inversion process follows a two-step procedure within each inversion window, in which the emissions are inferred first and then input into the CMAQ model to simulate initial conditions of the next window. Meanwhile, the optimized emissions are transferred to the next window as prior emissions. -The two-step inversion strategy facilitates error propagation and iterative emission optimization, which have proven the superiority and robustness of our system in estimating emissions (Feng et al., 2023). In this study, we extended the data frame to include the assimilation of TROPOMI HCHO retrievals for optimizing NMVOC emissions. Concise descriptions of the forecast model, data assimilation approach, and experimental settings follow.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为Fig.7饼图量化显示：汽油车PM2.5中OC占53.93%，EC占13.07%；柴油车EC占比达25.17%，揭示柴油车元素碳排放显著高于汽油车（近2倍）。,理由是视觉数据明确揭示车型排放组分差异，Metadata含关键参考文献paper_024及Zhang et al.2015，提供深入追溯路径。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['OC/EC ratio', 'PEMS监测', '碳组分占比']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The figure shows the percentages of PM2.5 components—organic carbon, elemental carbon, water-soluble ions, and inorganic elements—emitted from gasoline and diesel vehicles. The figure highlights the dominance of organic carbon in PM2.5 emissions and a significant difference in elemental carbon between gasoline and diesel vehicles, important for understanding vehicle pollution.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None
